items.title: Curbside Lambsear – “Man The Door”
items.summary: Magdalena Mclean is best known for playing in caroline, the critically acclaimed British post-rock collective whose latest record was our Album Of The Week. But she also performs in the art-punk group the Umlauts alongside Annabelle Mödlinger, and the two of them have their own project called Curbside Lambsear. It's a sprawling, six-minute meditation anchored to the ethereal uttering of the phrase, "With or without, I need you now," which progressively loses meaning through repetition, becoming an addictive sound floating through a dreamy atmosphere.

items.title: Día De Los Deftones 2026 Has Converge, Lip Critic, The Neighbourhood, & More
items.summary: Earlier today, we reported on the leak of Deftones' shelved album Eros. Now, we are back to report on the announcement of this year's Día De Los Deftones 2026, which has Converge, Lip Critic, the Neighbourhood, and more. The post Día De Los Deftones 2026 Has Converge, Lip Critic, The Neighbourhood, & More appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Long Odds – “Before Here”
items.summary: If you know anything about Long Odds, you know the warm and fuzzy indie rock project is led by Adam Elliott, drummer and vocalist for the recently reunited Times New Viking. We reminded you as much when we posted "Faorah," the lead single from Long Odds' new album The Dry Land. Philip Kim, for instance, is in Connections, and Joseph Anthony Camerlengo's many projects include Van Dale.
